description: Baseline Retrieval Stats vor RRF Fusion

retrieval.strategy: Sequential fallback: RAG → FTS5 → LIKE (only 1 source per query)

usage_tracking_columns.use_count: exists, incremented when memory used in context/intent retrieval
usage_tracking_columns.last_used_at: exists, updated when memory used in context/intent retrieval

retrieval.observation: RAG and FTS never run together. When RAG available, FTS is skipped entirely. No score fusion. No retrieval score persistence.
